Why Choose Us
ஏன் எங்களை தேர்வு செய்யணும்?
🌾
Pure Ingredients
100% natural rice flour & spices. Zero preservatives, zero artificial colors.
👐
Handmade Daily
Fresh batches every morning. Traditional hand-pressed murukku like Paati made.
🚀
Home Delivery
Delivery available within Usilampatti & nearby areas. Call to confirm timing.
🎁
Festival Gift Packs
Beautiful packaging for Diwali, Pongal, weddings & return gifts.
🏆
Since 2001
Over 24 years of trust. Usilampatti's most loved traditional murukku shop.
📦
Bulk Orders
Special price for bulk/wholesale orders. Perfect for shops & events.
